metodos.codigoOriginal:
Lparameters lnLin, lnCol, lcDet, lcEst, lcTam, lcAlt

lnLin = Iif(Type([lnLin]) == [N], lnLin, 0)
lnCol = Iif(Type([lnCol]) == [N], lnCol, 0)
lcDet = Iif(Type([lcDet]) == [C], lcDet, [])
lcEst = Iif(Type([lcEst]) == [C], Alltrim(lcEst), [X])

If (Not lcEst = [*] And (lnCol <> 0 Or lnLin <> 0))
	Insert Into TmpImprime (Linha, Coluna, Conteudo, Style, LineSize, NHeight) ;
  		   			Values (lnLin, lnCol, lcDet, lcEst, lcTam, lcAlt)
EndIf
* Fim *******************************************************... [TRUNCADO]

Local lcCli, llImp, lnCnt, ldVct, lcDoc, lnTm1, lnTm2, lnTam

Zap In crDados
Zap In TmpImprime

If Not ThisForm.poDataMgr.CursorQuery([SigMvCab], [crTprMvCab], [EmpDopNums], ThisForm.EmpDopNum, [Dopes, ContaOs, ContaDs])
	=MessageBox([Movimentaçăo Năo Encontrada!!!], 0+16, [Inconsistęncia Nos Dados])
	Return 0
EndIf

lcDoc = [Parc.: ] + Alltrim(Str(crGrade.Parcs, 2))
If ThisForm.poDataMgr.CursorQuery([SigMvNfi], [crTmpNfis], [EmpDopNums], ThisForm.EmpDopNum, [NFis])
	lcDoc = crTmpNfis.NFis + [-]... [TRUNCADO]

With ThisForm
	With .grdItens
		.ColumnCount 	   = 4
		.RecordSource 	   = [crGrade]
		.DeleteMark 	   = .f.
		.RecordMark 	   = .f.
		.ReadOnly 		   = .t.
		.Scrollbars 	   = 2
		.AllowHeaderSizing = .f.
		.AllowRowSizing    = .f.

		.Column1.ControlSource  = [crGrade.FPags]
		.Column2.ControlSource  = [crGrade.Parcs]
		.Column2.InputMask 	    = [99]
		.Column3.ControlSource  = [crGrade.Vencs]
		.Column4.ControlSource  = [crGrade.Valos]
		.Column4.InputMask 	    = [9999999.99]

		For I=1 To .Co... [TRUNCADO]

LParameters pEdn, pFrm

ThisForm.cntSombra.lblSombra.Caption = ThisForm.Caption
ThisForm.cntSombra.lblTitulo.Caption = ThisForm.Caption

With ThisForm
	.poDataMgr = CreateObject('fSqlConector', .Name)

	If (.poDataMgr.pnIdconn > 0)
		.EmpDopNum = Padr(pEdn, 29)

		.getEmps.Value  = Substr(.EmpDopNum, 01, 03)
		.getDopes.Value = Substr(.EmpDopNum, 04, 20)
		.getNumes.Value = Substr(.EmpDopNum, 24, 06)

		.getEmps.Refresh
		.getDopes.Refresh
		.getNumes.Refresh

		.MontaGrades

		.SelecionaDados

... [TRUNCADO]

=fConfigGeral()

Create Cursor crGrade (FPags c(12), Parcs n(2), CLocals c(100), Vencs d(8), Datas d(8), Valos n(12,2), CTxtCds m(4))

Create Cursor crDados (CLocals c(100), Vencs c(12), DatDoc d, NumDoc c(8), Valor n(14,2), Razaos c(50), Cpfs c(20), ;
					   EndCobs c(80), BaiCobs c(20), CidCobs c(20), EstCobs c(2), CepCobs c(9), Texto m)

Create Cursor TmpImprime (Linha n(6,2), Coluna n(6,2), Conteudo c(100), Style c(3), FontName c(64), ;
						  FontSize i, LineSize n(6,2), NHeight n(6,2))
I... [TRUNCADO]

LParameters nColIndex

Select crGrade
This.Refresh
ThisForm.Refresh
ThisForm.getLocals.Refresh
ThisForm.getTxtCds.Refresh 
* Fim **************************************************************************************

If Not Eof('crGrade')
	If MessageBox([Confirma a Impressăo do Boleto Bancário da Condiçăo de Pagamento:] + Chr(13) + Chr(13) + ;
				  Alltrim(crGrade.FPags) + [ - Parcela: ] + Alltrim(Str(crGrade.Parcs,2)), 32+4 )==6
		ThisForm.Imprimir 
	EndIf
EndIf
* Fim **************************************************************************************

sqlQueries.queryOriginal: Insert Into TmpImprime (Linha, Coluna, Conteudo, Style, LineSize, NHeight) ; 		   			Values (lnLin, lnCol, lcDet, lcEst, lcTam, lcAlt)
